caribbean.headline: Calm Seas and Light Winds Across Turks and Caicos Today
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos are experiencing calm conditions with winds at 0 knots and wave heights reaching 6.4 feet from an easterly swell direction. No rainfall is expected, and seas remain below Small Craft Advisory thresholds, ensuring smooth maritime operations in the region.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Winds with Elevated Swell Challenge Lisbon Waters
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing calm winds with sustained speeds at 0 knots, but significant wave heights reach 9.1 feet from a dominant WNW swell direction and a long 14-second swell period. These elevated seas pose navigational challenges despite the lack of wind or rain, requiring careful vessel handling in port and offshore approaches.
